population: 60 unique extreme upward-jump (subject, qid) pairs (deduplicated across 18 condition pairs)

method.post_response_source: FULL C4a response loaded from results files (NOT the 600-char truncation cached in pattern_activation_deep_20260428.json)

classification_rules.CORPUS_LEAK: n-gram appears in served spec or facts text
classification_rules.COMMON_PHRASE: 3-gram only; in COMMON_3GRAMS allowlist OR not subject-specific (no proper-noun tokens, no subject-name tokens, no specific year)
classification_rules.PRETRAINING_MEMO_CANDIDATE: subject-specific n-gram, not in served spec/facts/question; most likely from pretraining memorization of source autobiography
classification_rules.UNKNOWN: fallthrough (4+gram not subject-specific, not in served context)

method.substantive_rule: 6+gram match, OR 4-gram match not classified COMMON_PHRASE/QUESTION_ECHO

headline_impact.method: wins_inventory C5_to_C4a does not export per_question_pairs, so we cannot fully recompute means after exclusion. We report extreme_count delta only: subtract flagged (subject, qid) cases observed in each pair from the pair extreme_count. Mean deltas are unchanged at the per-question level because individual questions are not removed; they are flagged.
